class EventBus:
    def __init__(self):
        self.listeners = []

    def subscribe(self, callback):
        self.listeners.append(callback)

def process_requests(requests):
    for req in requests:
        bus = EventBus()
        handler = RequestHandler(bus)
        bus.subscribe(handler.handle)
        handler.process(req)
        handler.bus = bus

class RequestHandler:
    def __init__(self, bus):
        self.bus = bus
        self.buffer = bytearray(1024 * 1024)

    def handle(self, event):
        pass

    def process(self, request):
        self.bus.subscribe(lambda e: None)
